ashwood_bow.name: Ashwood Bow
ashwood_bow.summary: A travel bow with a quick draw and a forgiving pull.

bandit_mark.name: Bandit Mark
bandit_mark.summary: A stamped lead token used by the watchtower crews to mark shares, shifts, and authority.

barrow_relic.name: Barrow Relic
barrow_relic.summary: A weathered trinket from an old burial field, carrying more history than comfort.

batwing_bundle.name: Batwing Bundle
batwing_bundle.summary: A tied bundle of cave-bat wing leather, oily and irritatingly useful.

bellguard_bastion.name: Bellguard Bastion
bellguard_bastion.summary: A heavier shield re-rimmed in clean iron and chapel brass, built to keep the line intact even when courage gets uneven.

bellkeeper_mail.name: Bellkeeper Mail
bellkeeper_mail.summary: Ring-backed mail built for patrol, prayer, and hauling frightened people behind you.

bellwarden_icon.name: Bellwarden Icon
bellwarden_icon.summary: A brass-braced devotional icon fitted to hold steadier light and steadier prayers.

bent_fence_nails.name: Bent Fence Nails
bent_fence_nails.summary: A fistful of stolen nails and fasteners from the roadside fences.

blackreed_longcoat.name: Blackreed Longcoat
blackreed_longcoat.summary: Captain Varn's weather-dark longcoat, lined with hidden pockets and the smell of wet leather and command.

bramble_perch.name: Bramble Perch
bramble_perch.summary: A quick silver-sided river fish common around the town wharf.

briar_heart.name: Briar Heart
briar_heart.summary: A hard knot of thornwood and ember sap cut from a spiteful woodland creature.

briarpath_raiment.name: Briarpath Raiment
briarpath_raiment.summary: Trail wraps reinforced with silk and thorn cord, cut to move through brush like you knew it would part.

brushrunner_leathers.name: Brushrunner Leathers
brushrunner_leathers.summary: Close-stitched trail leathers reinforced to slide through thorn and trouble with less argument.

brute_chain_link.name: Brute Chain Link
brute_chain_link.summary: A heavy goblin-forged chain link cut from a brute harness or gate drag.

chapel_blade.name: Chapel Blade
chapel_blade.summary: A straight practical sword kept for road duty, oath work, and the sort of bad nights that require both.

cinderwire_staff.name: Cinderwire Staff
cinderwire_staff.summary: A reworked emberglass staff bound in black wire that keeps heat like a grudge.

crisped_perch_plate.name: Crisped Perch Plate
crisped_perch_plate.summary: Two pan-crisped perch with herbs and browned butter.

dawnbell_mace.name: Dawnbell Mace
dawnbell_mace.summary: A tempered mace whose head carries a quiet sun-mark beneath the iron.

dawnscale_trout.name: Dawnscale Trout
dawnscale_trout.summary: A rare trout with rose-gold scales and a clean river scent.

edrics_signet.name: Edric's Signet
edrics_signet.summary: A darkened knightly signet pulled from the hand of Sir Edric the Restless.

ember_lantern_focus.name: Ember Lantern Focus
ember_lantern_focus.summary: A brass-caged focus crystal tuned to answer faster when power moves through it.

emberglass_staff.name: Emberglass Staff
emberglass_staff.summary: A slim ash staff tipped with red glass that holds heat longer than it should.

fen_resin_clot.name: Fen Resin Clot
fen_resin_clot.summary: A dark clot of marsh resin and root sap that hardens into something halfway between lacquer and warning.

fenlight_talisman.name: Fenlight Talisman
fenlight_talisman.summary: A marsh-bright charm of glass, feather, and bound root that answers softly but never weakly.

field_bandage.name: Field Bandage
field_bandage.summary: A clean wrap and tincture packet meant to stop the worst bleeding before it becomes the whole story.

field_leathers.name: Field Leathers
field_leathers.summary: Light leather layers treated to turn rain, brush, and shallow cuts.

fireflask.name: Fire Flask
fireflask.summary: A stoppered glass flask of volatile pitch and ember salts, meant to be thrown from a safe distance and nowhere near your own eyebrows.

focus_tonic.name: Focus Tonic
focus_tonic.summary: A bitter vial that steadies the hands, clears the head, and puts a little fire back in the limbs.

fractured_circuit.name: Fractured Circuit
fractured_circuit.summary: A cracked control wafer pried from some long-dead machine mind.

goblin_knife.name: Goblin Knife
goblin_knife.summary: A mean little blade worth more as scrap than as a weapon.

grave_dust.name: Grave Dust
grave_dust.summary: Cold pale dust shaken loose from old barrows and things that should have stayed in them.

greymaw_pelt.name: Greymaw Pelt
greymaw_pelt.summary: The heavy scarred pelt of the wolf that ruled the deep trail.

grove_talisman.name: Grove Talisman
grove_talisman.summary: A twine-wrapped charm of seed, bone, and river-smoothed wood that steadies the breath and the will.

gutterfang_pair.name: Gutterfang Pair
gutterfang_pair.summary: Torren refiles the hooks, lightens the draw, and sends the pair back keen enough to reward hesitation in other people.

hedgeweave_robes.name: Hedgeweave Robes
hedgeweave_robes.summary: Practical apprentice robes lined against cold drafts and stray sparks.

hexbone_charm.name: Hexbone Charm
hexbone_charm.summary: A goblin charm woven from etched bone, soot cord, and the sort of confidence that should have been punished earlier.

hollow_glass_shard.name: Hollow Glass Shard
hollow_glass_shard.summary: A pale lens shard left where drowned lampglass held bad light too long and forgot how to go dark.

hollow_lantern_prism.name: Hollow Lantern Prism
hollow_lantern_prism.summary: A white-black prism from the drowned south light, cold in the hand and still too eager to catch any stray gleam.

hookknife_pair.name: Hookknife Pair
hookknife_pair.summary: A matched set of compact hookknives made for ugly work in close quarters and quicker exits after.

hound_iron_collar.name: Hound Iron Collar
hound_iron_collar.summary: A spiked collar ring cut from one of the watchtower's half-starved carrion hounds.

innkeepers_fishpie.name: Innkeeper's Fish Pie
innkeepers_fishpie.summary: A deep savory pie Uncle Pib approves of on principle.

ironroot_longblade.name: Ironroot Longblade
ironroot_longblade.summary: Torren's reworked frontier blade, ground cleaner and balanced for harder work.

ironroot_recurve.name: Ironroot Recurve
ironroot_recurve.summary: A tightened ash bow with horn tips and a quicker, cleaner draw.

kingshiv_pair.name: Kingshiv Pair
kingshiv_pair.summary: A matched set reforged from goblin chain and ridge steel, balanced for the sort of close work kings should fear.

lamplight_harness.name: Lamplight Harness
lamplight_harness.summary: A warden's harness cut from road mail and drowned-line salvage, meant for the sort of work towns sing about only after it is done.

lantern_carp.name: Lantern Carp
lantern_carp.summary: A broad amber carp that flashes gold under the lanterns.

lantern_focus.name: Lantern Focus
lantern_focus.summary: A palm-sized focus crystal wrapped in brass wire from old Brambleford lanterns.

lantern_pixel_pin.name: Lantern Pixel Pin
lantern_pixel_pin.summary: A bright enamel pin shaped like a little maze-lantern grin. Joss only parts with them when a cabinet sings for somebody.

lanternlined_robes.name: Lanternlined Robes
lanternlined_robes.summary: Apprentice robes rebuilt with better hems, hidden pockets, and enough lining to ignore sparks.

locklight_blade.name: Locklight Blade
locklight_blade.summary: A sunforged sword rebuilt with drowned weir iron and hollow lensglass until it feels meant for ending stubborn lights.

magnetized_scrap.name: Magnetized Scrap
magnetized_scrap.summary: A plate of salvage still tugging toward anything metal with irritating enthusiasm.

marshsong_staff.name: Marshsong Staff
marshsong_staff.summary: A thorn staff rebuilt with fen resin and wispglass until the grain hums like water remembering moonlight.

militia_blade.name: Militia Blade
militia_blade.summary: A sturdy frontier sword with just enough weight behind it.

mire_hound_hide.name: Mire Hound Hide
mire_hound_hide.summary: A swamp-stinking hide cut from a fen hound tough enough to keep the wet out and the smell in.

miretooth_fang.name: Miretooth Fang
miretooth_fang.summary: A hooked predator fang from the beast ruling the fen edge, still carrying a sick green stain near the root.

moonleaf_sprig.name: Moonleaf Sprig
moonleaf_sprig.summary: A pale herb sprig with a cool silver scent that clings to the fingers.

mossweave_wraps.name: Mossweave Wraps
mossweave_wraps.summary: Soft layered wraps stitched for damp trails, hedge work, and anyone who expects weather more than applause.

mudsnout_catfish.name: Mudsnout Catfish
mudsnout_catfish.summary: An ugly whiskered bottom-feeder that still cooks up surprisingly well.

nailbound_heater.name: Nailbound Heater
nailbound_heater.summary: A stout shield faced with fresh iron and the sort of confidence Torren hammers into everything.

nightpath_leathers.name: Nightpath Leathers
nightpath_leathers.summary: Dark fitted leathers cut light through the shoulder and quiet through the buckle.

oakbound_shield.name: Oakbound Shield
oakbound_shield.summary: A scarred but reliable shield reinforced by practical iron bands.

parrying_dagger.name: Parrying Dagger
parrying_dagger.summary: A narrow off-hand blade balanced to catch steel, hands, or attention at exactly the wrong moment for the other person.

pilgrim_mace.name: Pilgrim Mace
pilgrim_mace.summary: A compact mace carried as much for certainty as ceremony.

potking_ladle.name: Pot-King Ladle
potking_ladle.summary: Grubnak's iron ladle-scepter, dented, greasy, and somehow still threatening on principle alone.

purity_salts.name: Purity Salts
purity_salts.summary: A sharp-smelling packet of bitter salts and herbs used to break poison, steady the gut, and drive lesser afflictions out through sheer insult.

reedwoven_raiment.name: Reedwoven Raiment
reedwoven_raiment.summary: A field robe strengthened with hide, resin, and reed cord, light enough for the marsh and sturdy enough for the argument after.

ridgebreaker_blade.name: Ridgebreaker Blade
ridgebreaker_blade.summary: A longblade reforged with tower iron and goblin chain, built to end arguments before they reach your back line.

riverlight_chowder.name: Riverlight Chowder
riverlight_chowder.summary: A creamy chowder bright with carp, eel, and a peppery finish.

rivetmail_coat.name: Rivetmail Coat
rivetmail_coat.summary: A roadwarden coat rebuilt with better rings, firmer leather, and less patience for sharp edges.

road_charm.name: Road Charm
road_charm.summary: A crude goblin trinket plaited from string, bone, and bad ideas.

roadchapel_vestments.name: Roadchapel Vestments
roadchapel_vestments.summary: Traveling vestments cut closer at the shoulder and lined to hold against cold graves and bad nights.

roadwarden_mail.name: Roadwarden Mail
roadwarden_mail.summary: A patched shirt of mail that favors endurance over elegance.

rootwood_staff.name: Rootwood Staff
rootwood_staff.summary: A living wood staff polished by use rather than ceremony, light in the hand and stubborn in the grain.

rotcrow_pinion.name: Rotcrow Pinion
rotcrow_pinion.summary: A long black marsh feather with an oily sheen and the faint smell of stagnant water.

shadowtrail_leathers.name: Shadowtrail Leathers
shadowtrail_leathers.summary: Field leathers rebuilt to move softer, turn quicker, and stop arguing every time the brush gets mean.

silk_bundle.name: Silk Bundle
silk_bundle.summary: A careful coil of cave spider silk, sticky but valuable.

silt_hook.name: Silt Hook
silt_hook.summary: A barbed marsh hook pulled from a drowned chain line or something worse that learned to use one.

silver_eel.name: Silver Eel
silver_eel.summary: A slick river eel prized for rich broth and difficult handling.

slagglass_rod.name: Slagglass Rod
slagglass_rod.summary: A hotter, narrower casting rod carrying fused slagglass through the core and a temperament Torren claims is your problem.

sludge_resin.name: Sludge Resin
sludge_resin.summary: A tar-thick glob of cavern sludge that hardens into something halfway between glue and lacquer.

smokeglass_dagger.name: Smokeglass Dagger
smokeglass_dagger.summary: A darker, cleaner parrying dagger with a mirrored black edge that disappears unless it is moving.

splintered_axe_head.name: Splintered Axe Head
splintered_axe_head.summary: The broken iron head of Ruk's notorious fence-cutter.

sun_prayer_icon.name: Sun Prayer Icon
sun_prayer_icon.summary: A worn devotional icon that steadies the hand and focuses the spirit.

sunforged_blade.name: Sunforged Blade
sunforged_blade.summary: A cleaner, brighter chapel sword with a brass sun-mark hidden beneath the fuller and more certainty in the edge.

sunwake_maul.name: Sunwake Maul
sunwake_maul.summary: A dawn-marked war maul capped with warding brass and just enough spite for goblin kings and older things alike.

thorn_rat_tail.name: Thorn Rat Tail
thorn_rat_tail.summary: A prickly rat tail clipped from a roadside scavenger.

thorncall_staff.name: Thorncall Staff
thorncall_staff.summary: A rootwood staff hardened with briar heart and moonleaf resin until every strike of power feels a little more deliberate.

thornline_knife.name: Thornline Knife
thornline_knife.summary: A lean field knife sharpened for brush, rope, and anyone who mistakes you for easy work.

tower_arrowhead.name: Tower Arrowhead
tower_arrowhead.summary: A heavy bodkin arrowhead made to punch through mail from a high perch.

trail_knife.name: Trail Knife
trail_knife.summary: A belt knife meant for camp work, skinning, and close trouble.

trail_mix_satchel.name: Trail Mix Satchel
trail_mix_satchel.summary: A waxed trail pouch packed with nuts, berries, and enough salt to pull you back into the fight.

ward_dust.name: Ward Dust
ward_dust.summary: A pinch of ash-bright chapel dust that settles over skin and cloth like a quick ward against the next bad hit.

ward_iron_rivet.name: Ward Iron Rivet
ward_iron_rivet.summary: A heavy old rivet cut from drowned weir iron, still bright at the core where the wrong light kept finding it.

warded_kite.name: Warded Kite
warded_kite.summary: A chapel-kept kite shield marked in chalk prayer and brass nailwork.

wardens_cuirass.name: Warden's Cuirass
wardens_cuirass.summary: Road mail rebuilt for longer nights and uglier dead, with a steadier shoulder and less tolerance for panic.

warrenspine_recurve.name: Warrenspine Recurve
warrenspine_recurve.summary: A horn-backed recurve tuned with tower arrow stock and cave sinew for faster, nastier line shots.

wayfarer_vestments.name: Wayfarer Vestments
wayfarer_vestments.summary: Travel-ready robes stitched for mud, weather, and long prayers.

weirward_bulwark.name: Weirward Bulwark
weirward_bulwark.summary: A broad shield plated in old lock iron and chapel brass, heavy enough to make a promise of standing still matter.

wharfside_skewers.name: Wharfside Skewers
wharfside_skewers.summary: Charred fish skewers with enough smoke and salt to stiffen the spine.

wildbloom_talisman.name: Wildbloom Talisman
wildbloom_talisman.summary: A brighter hedge charm threaded with moonleaf and silk, good for steady hands and longer breaths.

wispglass_shard.name: Wispglass Shard
wispglass_shard.summary: A pale glassy shard left where fen-light gathers too long around old water and bad memory.

wolf_fang.name: Wolf Fang
wolf_fang.summary: A long fang that makes a tidy proof of the kill.

wolf_pelt.name: Wolf Pelt
wolf_pelt.summary: A rough grey pelt, useful enough to trade or keep.
